creator: ashish@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to dewayne from comment #0)

I just encountered this on one of my host as well, and I think if you uninstall existing ejabberd, and then build/install ejabberd, it should build. I will try to work on some fix, but my erlang-foo is not great.

Could you see if this works for you too ?

HTH
Ashish
